layout-navbar-navigation.name: Navbar Navigation
layout-navbar-navigation.description: Navigate between pages using the fixed top navbar.

layout-locale-switch.name: Locale Switch
layout-locale-switch.description: Switch the application language between English and Spanish.

layout-footer-navigation.name: Footer Navigation
layout-footer-navigation.description: Navigate using footer links and social media links.

public-home.name: Home Page
public-home.description: View the public home/landing page with hero, services, study cases and contact.

public-portfolio.name: Portfolio Works
public-portfolio.description: Browse portfolio works and project showcases.

public-portfolio-detail.name: Portfolio Case Study Detail
public-portfolio-detail.description: View a single portfolio case study with cover image, content sections, share button, and back navigation.

public-about-us.name: About Us (archived)
public-about-us.description: ARCHIVED — page removed from navigation, no internal links. View the about us page with team and company information.
public-about-us.knownGaps: Page exists but is unreachable from navigation. Flow archived.

public-landing-web-design.name: Landing Web Design
public-landing-web-design.description: View the web design landing page (marketing/conversion page).

public-contact-submit.name: Contact Form Submit
public-contact-submit.description: Submit a contact form to reach the company.

blog-list.name: Blog Listing
blog-list.description: Browse the blog listing with search, category filters, featured hero post, and responsive grid/mobile cards.

blog-detail.name: Blog Post Detail
blog-detail.description: Read a blog post with structured JSON content (sections, timelines, lists, subsections) or HTML fallback, sources, share, related posts.

proposal-view.name: Proposal View
proposal-view.description: View a business proposal shared via unique UUID link with horizontal scroll.

proposal-respond.name: Proposal Respond
proposal-respond.description: Client responds to (accepts/rejects) a business proposal.

proposal-download-pdf.name: Proposal PDF Download
proposal-download-pdf.description: Client uses the floating PDF button; browser fetches GET /api/proposals/:uuid/pdf. E2E mocks a 200 PDF response.
knownGaps: Production may return 501 if PDF generation is disabled; E2E covers the UI path when the API succeeds.

admin-login.name: Admin Login
admin-login.description: Admin authenticates to access the management panel.

admin-dashboard.name: Admin Dashboard
admin-dashboard.description: View the admin dashboard with overview of proposals and blog posts.

admin-proposal-list.name: Admin Proposal List
admin-proposal-list.description: View the list of all business proposals.

admin-proposal-create.name: Admin Proposal Create
admin-proposal-create.description: Create a new business proposal with sections and requirements.

admin-proposal-send.name: Admin Proposal Send
admin-proposal-send.description: Send a proposal to a client via email.

admin-blog-list.name: Admin Blog List
admin-blog-list.description: View the list of all blog posts (admin view with both languages).

admin-blog-create.name: Admin Blog Create (Manual)
admin-blog-create.description: Create a new bilingual blog post via manual form with category, readTime, featured, SEO fields.

admin-blog-create-from-json.name: Admin Blog Create (JSON Import)
admin-blog-create-from-json.description: Create a blog post by importing a structured JSON payload with content_json sections, template download, validation, and preview.

admin-blog-edit.name: Admin Blog Edit
admin-blog-edit.description: Edit an existing blog post including new fields: category, readTime, isFeatured, content_json, SEO meta.

admin-proposal-section-edit-form.name: Admin Proposal Section Edit (Form)
admin-proposal-section-edit-form.description: Edit proposal sections using structured form fields for each of the 12 section types.

admin-proposal-section-edit-paste.name: Admin Proposal Section Edit (Paste Content)
admin-proposal-section-edit-paste.description: Bulk-fill proposal section fields by pasting text and processing it into structured form data.

admin-proposal-section-reorder.name: Admin Proposal Section Reorder
admin-proposal-section-reorder.description: Reorder sections within a proposal via drag or API.

admin-proposal-functional-requirements-f.name: Admin Functional Requirements (Form)
admin-proposal-functional-requirements-f.description: Manage requirement groups and items using the structured form interface.

admin-proposal-functional-requirements-p.name: Admin Functional Requirements (Paste Content)
admin-proposal-functional-requirements-p.description: Bulk-fill requirement group items by pasting formatted text.

proposal-share.name: Proposal Share
proposal-share.description: Client shares the proposal with a stakeholder via tracked share link.

proposal-engagement-tracking.name: Proposal Engagement Tracking
proposal-engagement-tracking.description: Automatic section-level engagement tracking with stakeholder detection and follow-up alerts.

admin-proposal-duplicate.name: Admin Proposal Duplicate
admin-proposal-duplicate.description: Duplicate an existing proposal to create a new draft copy.

admin-proposal-comment.name: Admin Proposal Comment
admin-proposal-comment.description: Add internal comments to a proposal for team collaboration.

admin-proposal-analytics.name: Admin Proposal Analytics
admin-proposal-analytics.description: View detailed analytics for a single proposal: funnel, heatmap, sessions, CSV export.

admin-proposal-dashboard.name: Admin Proposal Dashboard
admin-proposal-dashboard.description: View global KPI dashboard for all proposals: conversion rate, trends, rejection reasons.

admin-mini-crm-clients.name: Admin Mini-CRM Clients
admin-mini-crm-clients.description: View client list with search, tab filtering (Todos/Activos/Huérfanos), expand client to see linked proposals, and empty state.

admin-portfolio-list.name: Admin Portfolio List
admin-portfolio-list.description: View the list of all portfolio works with status, edit/duplicate/delete actions.

admin-portfolio-create.name: Admin Portfolio Create
admin-portfolio-create.description: Create a new portfolio work via manual form or JSON import.

admin-portfolio-edit.name: Admin Portfolio Edit
admin-portfolio-edit.description: Edit an existing portfolio work including bilingual fields, cover image, content JSON, and SEO.

proposal-view-navigation.name: Proposal View Navigation
proposal-view-navigation.description: Navigate between proposal sections using prev/next buttons and ProposalIndex panel.

proposal-view-onboarding.name: Proposal View Onboarding
proposal-view-onboarding.description: First-visit tutorial overlay with step-by-step tooltips and reading time popup.

admin-proposal-create-from-json.name: Admin Proposal Create (JSON Import)
admin-proposal-create-from-json.description: Create a proposal by importing a pre-filled JSON payload with all 12 section content_json values.

admin-blog-calendar.name: Admin Blog Calendar
admin-blog-calendar.description: Weekly calendar view showing scheduled, published, and draft blog posts.

admin-proposal-manual-alerts.name: Admin Proposal Manual Alerts
admin-proposal-manual-alerts.description: Create, view, and dismiss manual seller alerts/reminders for proposals.

admin-proposal-win-rate-dashboard.name: Admin Proposal Win Rate Dashboard
admin-proposal-win-rate-dashboard.description: Dashboard win rate segmented by project type, market type, and combination.

admin-proposal-engagement-score.name: Admin Proposal Engagement Score
admin-proposal-engagement-score.description: Engagement score (0-100) per proposal in analytics tab with color-coded level and recommendation.

admin-proposal-metrics-manual.name: Admin Proposal Metrics Manual
admin-proposal-metrics-manual.description: Floating ? button opens slide-over with searchable metric definitions.

proposal-welcome-back.name: Proposal Welcome Back
proposal-welcome-back.description: Returning client sees welcome-back overlay with name and last visited section.

proposal-process-methodology.name: Proposal Process & Methodology
proposal-process-methodology.description: 5-step visual pipeline section (Discovery → Diseño → Desarrollo → QA → Lanzamiento).

proposal-pre-expiration-discount-suggest.name: Pre-Expiration Discount Suggestion
proposal-pre-expiration-discount-suggest.description: Periodic task creates discount_suggestion alert for viewed proposals expiring within 5 days.
knownGaps: Backend-only periodic task, covered by backend unit tests

admin-proposal-zombie-segment.name: Admin Proposal Zombie Segment
admin-proposal-zombie-segment.description: Dark-themed collapsible zombie alerts section for stale draft/sent proposals.

proposal-countdown-realtime.name: Proposal Countdown Realtime
proposal-countdown-realtime.description: HH:MM countdown timer when proposal expires within 48 hours.

admin-proposal-create-and-send.name: Admin Proposal Create & Send
admin-proposal-create-and-send.description: Create and send proposal in one step when client data is complete.

admin-proposal-create-preview.name: Admin Proposal Create Preview
admin-proposal-create-preview.description: Post-creation interstitial modal with preview, send, and edit options.

admin-seller-inactivity-escalation.name: Admin Seller Inactivity Escalation
admin-seller-inactivity-escalation.description: Periodic task sends escalation email for proposals with >=5 days no seller activity.
knownGaps: Backend-only periodic task, covered by backend unit tests

admin-dashboard-pipeline-value.name: Admin Dashboard Pipeline Value
admin-dashboard-pipeline-value.description: Pipeline Value KPI card showing sum of total_investment for active sent+viewed proposals.

proposal-rejection-optional-reason.name: Proposal Rejection Optional Reason
proposal-rejection-optional-reason.description: Rejection reason is optional with nudge text encouraging feedback.

proposal-calculator-timeline.name: Proposal Calculator Dynamic Timeline
proposal-calculator-timeline.description: Investment calculator shows dynamic timeline changes: deselecting investment modules reduces weeks, selecting calculator modules adds ~1 week each.

admin-discount-analysis-enhanced.name: Admin Discount Analysis Enhanced
admin-discount-analysis-enhanced.description: Enhanced discount card with sample sizes, avg discount %, and delta warning.

proposal-negotiate.name: Proposal Negotiate (Accept with Changes)
proposal-negotiate.description: Client clicks 'Aceptar con cambios' → negotiate modal → required comment → submit → negotiating success state.

proposal-investment-calculator.name: Proposal Investment Calculator
proposal-investment-calculator.description: Client opens calculator modal, toggles optional modules, sees dynamic total/timeline, confirms selection.

admin-proposal-actions-modal.name: Admin Proposal Actions Modal
admin-proposal-actions-modal.description: Admin opens actions modal from listing with edit, preview, send/resend, copy, WhatsApp, duplicate, toggle, delete actions.

proposal-comment-from-closing.name: Proposal Comment from Closing
proposal-comment-from-closing.description: Client submits written comments from the closing panel via comment modal.

proposal-rejection-smart-recovery.name: Proposal Rejection Smart Recovery
proposal-rejection-smart-recovery.description: After rejection, context-specific recovery cards render based on rejection reason with appropriate CTAs.

proposal-functional-requirements-modal.name: Proposal Functional Requirements Modal
proposal-functional-requirements-modal.description: Client clicks requirement group card to open detail modal showing items with icons and descriptions.

proposal-calculator-modules.name: Proposal Calculator Modules (PWA, AI, Reports)
proposal-calculator-modules.description: Calculator modal displays modules in order: PWA (40%), AI (invite-only), Smart Conversions (invite-only), Electronic Invoicing (60%), International Payments (20%), Regional Payments (20%), Email Marketing (10%), Reports & Alerts (20%, default selected), Multi-idioma (15%). Info badge at top of modal. Selecting modules adds ~1 week to timeline.

proposal-expired-graceful.name: Proposal Expired Graceful
proposal-expired-graceful.description: Expired proposal returns 410 with partial data; frontend renders ProposalExpired with client name, WhatsApp CTA, and email contact.

admin-proposal-batch-actions.name: Admin Proposal Batch Actions
admin-proposal-batch-actions.description: Select multiple proposals via checkboxes and perform batch actions (re-send, expire, delete) with sticky action bar.

admin-proposal-quick-send.name: Admin Proposal Quick Send
admin-proposal-quick-send.description: Send or re-send a proposal directly from the proposals list without entering edit page.
knownGaps: Covered within admin-proposal-list.spec.js

admin-proposal-quick-log.name: Admin Proposal Quick Log Activity
admin-proposal-quick-log.description: Register a seller activity (call, meeting, follow-up, note) directly from the proposals list via quick-log modal.

admin-proposal-json-import-warnings.name: Admin Proposal JSON Import Warnings
admin-proposal-json-import-warnings.description: JSON import returns warnings for unmapped section keys; warnings displayed in post-creation modal.
knownGaps: Covered within admin-proposal-create.spec.js

proposal-summary-kpis.name: Proposal Summary KPIs
proposal-summary-kpis.description: Proposal Summary section displays personalized KPI cards with value, label, and source citation.

proposal-calculator-new-modules.name: Proposal Calculator New Default Modules
proposal-calculator-new-modules.description: Calculator displays Email Marketing (10%), i18n (15%), Gift Cards (20%) modules. KPI Dashboard removed from calculator (included by default like Analytics).

proposal-calculator-integrations.name: Proposal Calculator Integration Modules
proposal-calculator-integrations.description: Calculator displays integration groups as toggleable modules: International Payments (20%), Regional Payments (20%), Electronic Invoicing (60%), Conversion Tracking (invite-only, 0%).

proposal-discount-multi-section.name: Proposal Discount Multi-Section
proposal-discount-multi-section.description: Discount badge visible in Investment banner, Calculator footer, and ProposalClosing special price badge.

admin-proposal-log-activity.name: Admin Proposal Log Activity (Edit Page)
admin-proposal-log-activity.description: Admin logs seller activity from proposal edit page Activity tab.

admin-proposal-engagement-decay-alert.name: Admin Proposal Engagement Decay Alert
admin-proposal-engagement-decay-alert.description: System creates engagement_decay alert when client views fewer sections than average.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

admin-proposal-post-rejection-revisit.name: Admin Proposal Post-Rejection Revisit
admin-proposal-post-rejection-revisit.description: System creates post_rejection_revisit alert when rejected proposal is revisited.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

proposal-calculator-abandonment-tracking.name: Proposal Calculator Abandonment Tracking
proposal-calculator-abandonment-tracking.description: Calculator tracks confirmed/abandoned module selections as ProposalChangeLog entries.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

proposal-onboarding-mobile-swipe.name: Proposal Onboarding Mobile Viewport
proposal-onboarding-mobile-swipe.description: Onboarding tooltip steps render correctly on mobile viewport with navigation buttons.

proposal-og-meta-personalized.name: Proposal OG Meta Personalized
proposal-og-meta-personalized.description: Personalized Open Graph meta tags for WhatsApp/social media previews.

admin-proposal-dashboard-auto-refresh.name: Admin Proposal Dashboard Auto-Refresh
admin-proposal-dashboard-auto-refresh.description: Dashboard KPI panel auto-refreshes every 60s with manual refresh button and last-updated label.

admin-proposal-inline-status-change.name: Admin Proposal Inline Status Change
admin-proposal-inline-status-change.description: Change proposal status directly from the proposals table via inline dropdown.

admin-proposal-defaults-config.name: Admin Proposal Defaults Config
admin-proposal-defaults-config.description: Manage default section configurations for new proposals (ES/EN), with save and reset-to-hardcoded.

admin-email-templates-config.name: Admin Email Templates Config
admin-email-templates-config.description: Manage email template text customization with category filter, inline editing, HTML preview, active toggle, and reset to defaults.

admin-proposal-scorecard.name: Admin Proposal Pre-Send Scorecard
admin-proposal-scorecard.description: View a 1-10 completeness scorecard with blockers before sending a proposal.

admin-proposal-section-completeness.name: Admin Proposal Section Completeness
admin-proposal-section-completeness.description: Progress bar showing percentage of enabled sections with content in the edit view.

admin-daily-pipeline-digest.name: Admin Daily Pipeline Digest
admin-daily-pipeline-digest.description: Daily email digest with viewed yesterday, inactive, and expiring proposals.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

admin-high-engagement-alert.name: Admin High Engagement Alert
admin-high-engagement-alert.description: System creates high_engagement_today alert when client has 3+ view sessions in one day.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

admin-calculator-followup-alert.name: Admin Calculator Abandonment Follow-up
admin-calculator-followup-alert.description: System creates calculator_followup alert 24h after calculator abandonment without confirmation.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

admin-whatsapp-suggestion.name: Admin WhatsApp Suggestion
admin-whatsapp-suggestion.description: System creates whatsapp_suggestion alert with pre-drafted message based on top viewed section.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

admin-auto-archive-zombie.name: Admin Auto-Archive Zombie Proposals
admin-auto-archive-zombie.description: System auto-archives expired proposals with no activity in 30 days.
knownGaps: Backend-only, covered by backend unit tests

proposal-calculator-selected-first.name: Proposal Calculator Selected Modules First
proposal-calculator-selected-first.description: Calculator modal sorts groups with pre-selected modules to the top so the client sees included modules first.

proposal-calculator-micro-feedback.name: Proposal Calculator Micro-Feedback
proposal-calculator-micro-feedback.description: Transient +/- price badge when toggling calculator modules with prices.

proposal-calculator-reopen-after-nav.name: Proposal Calculator Reopen After Nav
proposal-calculator-reopen-after-nav.description: Calculator module selections persist across section navigation but reset on hard reload: deselection + confirm remains after navigating away and back; a browser reload re-fetches backend state.

proposal-payment-plan-closing.name: Proposal Payment Plan in Closing
proposal-payment-plan-closing.description: Display payment plan milestones near the accept button in the closing section.

proposal-post-acceptance-welcome.name: Proposal Post-Acceptance Welcome Kit
proposal-post-acceptance-welcome.description: After acceptance: PDF download, onboarding timeline, and PM WhatsApp contact.

proposal-structured-negotiation.name: Proposal Structured Negotiation Modal
proposal-structured-negotiation.description: Negotiate modal with structured checkbox reasons and tab toggle for adjust vs comment.

proposal-conditional-acceptance.name: Proposal Conditional Acceptance
proposal-conditional-acceptance.description: Accept with an optional condition note (Acepto, pero...).

proposal-section-onboarding.name: Proposal Section Onboarding
proposal-section-onboarding.description: Per-section spotlight onboarding tutorials (Investment, Requirements, Executive Investment) that trigger on first visit to each section.

proposal-executive-to-detailed.name: Proposal Executive to Detailed View Switch
proposal-executive-to-detailed.description: Client switches from executive view to full detailed proposal via 'Ver Propuesta Completa' button with branded transition overlay.

proposal-technical-view.name: Proposal Technical View Mode
proposal-technical-view.description: Client opens public proposal with ?mode=technical to read the technical document (synthetic panels from technical_document) plus closing.

platform-login.name: Platform Login
platform-login.description: Client or admin authenticates via JWT login form. Routes to /platform/verify (first login), /platform/complete-profile (profile incomplete), or /platform/dashboard (onboarded).

platform-verify-onboarding.name: Platform Verify & Onboarding
platform-verify-onboarding.description: First-login OTP verification with 6-digit code input, new password set, and redirect to complete-profile or dashboard.

platform-complete-profile.name: Platform Complete Profile
platform-complete-profile.description: Mandatory profile completion form with company, phone, cedula, date of birth, gender, education level, and optional avatar upload. Middleware gates dashboard access until completed.

platform-kanban-board.name: Platform Kanban Board
platform-kanban-board.description: 3-column kanban board (Por hacer, En progreso, En revisión) with collapsible Completados checklist. HTML5 drag & drop between columns, checkmark to complete, card detail modal with comments and history timeline. Admin has full control; client can only approve in_review cards.

platform-dashboard.name: Platform Dashboard
platform-dashboard.description: Admin dashboard shows KPI cards (active/pending/inactive clients), recent clients table, and upcoming modules. Client dashboard shows profile summary and upcoming modules.

platform-sidebar-navigation.name: Platform Sidebar Navigation
platform-sidebar-navigation.description: Left sidebar layout with collapsible navigation (Principal, Proyectos, Administración sections), mobile hamburger drawer, theme toggle (light/dark), profile link, and logout.

platform-project-list.name: Platform Project List
platform-project-list.description: Admin sees all projects with status filters (Todos/Activos/Pausados/Completados/Archivados) and create button. Client sees only their assigned projects. Card grid with progress bars and estimated dates.

platform-project-detail.name: Platform Project Detail
platform-project-detail.description: Project detail hub with stats row (progress, client, dates), module cards (Tablero active, others 'Próximamente'), and admin edit modal for name, description, status, dates.

platform-unified-board.name: Platform Unified Board
platform-unified-board.description: Cross-project view showing active requirement cards (todo/in_progress/in_review) grouped by project with summary pills and links to per-project boards.

platform-admin-client-list.name: Platform Admin Client List
platform-admin-client-list.description: Admin-only client management table with invite modal (create + send credentials), status filters (Todos/Onboarded/Pendientes/Inactivos), search, resend invite, and deactivate actions.

platform-admin-client-detail.name: Platform Admin Client Detail
platform-admin-client-detail.description: Admin-only client detail page with profile card, edit form (name, company, phone, active toggle), quick actions (resend invite, deactivate/reactivate).

platform-profile-edit.name: Platform Profile Edit
platform-profile-edit.description: View and update personal profile fields (name, company, phone, cedula, DOB, gender, education) with avatar display and role badge.

platform-admin-project-create.name: Platform Admin Project Create
platform-admin-project-create.description: Admin creates a new project via modal form with name, description, client selector, start date, and estimated end date.

platform-kanban-card-comments.name: Platform Kanban Card Comments
platform-kanban-card-comments.description: Add public or internal (admin-only) comments on requirement cards via the card detail modal. Internal comments marked with amber border and 'Interno' label.

proposal-view-paste-rendering.name: Proposal View Paste Mode Rendering
proposal-view-paste-rendering.description: Client views paste-mode sections rendered as RawContentSection with markdown in a styled card, while form-mode sections render structured Vue components.

proposal-sticky-bar-accept.name: Proposal Sticky Bar Accept (ARCHIVED)
proposal-sticky-bar-accept.description: ARCHIVED — ProposalResponseButtons component removed from production. Acceptance handled via ProposalClosing section buttons.
knownGaps: Feature removed from production. Flow archived.

platform-change-requests.name: Platform Change Requests
platform-change-requests.description: Client creates change requests for a project. Admin evaluates (approve/reject/needs clarification) with estimated cost and time. Both roles can comment. Per-project view at /platform/projects/:id/changes and unified cross-project view at /platform/changes.

platform-bug-reports.name: Platform Bug Reports
platform-bug-reports.description: Both roles report bugs with severity, steps to reproduce, expected/actual behavior, device/browser, screenshot. Admin evaluates with status changes and responses. Per-project view at /platform/projects/:id/bugs and unified cross-project view at /platform/bugs.

platform-deliverables.name: Platform Deliverables
platform-deliverables.description: Admin uploads deliverables (designs, documents, APKs, credentials) with version history. Client downloads files. Per-project view at /platform/projects/:id/deliverables and unified cross-project view at /platform/deliverables.

platform-hosting-subscription.name: Platform Hosting Subscription
platform-hosting-subscription.description: Client selects hosting plan (semiannual/quarterly/monthly) from project payments page, activates subscription, and pays via Wompi (card or widget). Admin sees subscription status. Netflix-style active state with next renewal date. Per-project view at /platform/projects/:id/payments and unified view at /platform/payments.

platform-notifications.name: Platform Notifications
platform-notifications.description: In-app notification center with unread count badge in sidebar, filter tabs (all/unread/read), mark-all-read, and click-to-navigate deep links to the relevant project module (board, changes, bugs, deliverables).

platform-kanban-json-upload.name: Platform Kanban JSON Upload
platform-kanban-json-upload.description: Admin bulk-creates requirements by uploading a JSON file. Includes downloadable example template. Each requirement has title, description, configuration (roles/permissions), and flow (user flow). POST /api/accounts/projects/:projectId/deliverables/:deliverableId/requirements/bulk/.

platform-requirement-client-review.name: Platform Requirement Client Review
platform-requirement-client-review.description: Client reviews completed requirements from the Kanban board. Clicking a done card shows three options: Approve (marks as accepted), Request Change (navigates to change requests with pre-filled data), or Report Bug (navigates to bugs with pre-filled data).

admin-document-list.name: Admin Document List
admin-document-list.description: View the list of admin documents with title, status, client association, and actions (edit, download PDF, duplicate, delete). Navigate to create or edit pages.

admin-document-create.name: Admin Document Create
admin-document-create.description: Create a new admin document via Markdown paste mode or file upload mode, with title, optional client association, and live preview.

admin-document-edit.name: Admin Document Edit
admin-document-edit.description: Edit an existing admin document, change content, update status, and download as PDF.

admin-document-folders.name: Admin Document Folders and Tags
admin-document-folders.description: Organize admin documents with folders and tags: sidebar folder navigation, tag filter chips, and folder/tag management modals.

admin-admin-management.name: Admin User Management
admin-admin-management.description: Manage admin users: list with status filters (All/Active/Inactive), invite new admin via modal, view and deactivate existing admins.

admin-email-deliverability.name: Admin Email Deliverability Dashboard
admin-email-deliverability.description: Dashboard tracking email send/delivery/bounce rates for all proposal-related automated emails. Accessible from /panel/proposals/email-deliverability.

admin-view-map.name: Admin View Map
admin-view-map.description: Open the panel route inventory, filter grouped views, and copy route references for support and QA communication.

public-landing-software.name: Landing Software Development
public-landing-software.description: View the custom software development landing page with hero, features, CTA, and contact form section.

public-landing-apps.name: Landing App Development
public-landing-apps.description: View the mobile app development landing page with hero, features, CTA, and contact form section.

platform-collection-accounts-list.name: Platform Collection Accounts List
platform-collection-accounts-list.description: Browse collection accounts at /platform/collection-accounts: table, filters (admin), new draft (admin), Open links to detail.

platform-collection-account-detail.name: Platform Collection Account Detail
platform-collection-account-detail.description: View a single collection account: amounts, line items, Download PDF; admin Issue / Mark paid / Cancel when applicable.

platform-project-collection-accounts.name: Platform Project Collection Accounts
platform-project-collection-accounts.description: List collection accounts scoped to a project at /platform/projects/:id/collection-accounts with links to detail.

platform-deliverable-detail.name: Platform Deliverable Detail
platform-deliverable-detail.description: View deliverable detail at /platform/projects/:id/deliverables/:deliverableId: linked proposal PDFs, main file, epic, board link; admin attachment upload.

admin-proposal-contract-generate.name: Admin Proposal Contract Generate
admin-proposal-contract-generate.description: Admin generates a development contract from the proposal edit Documents tab. Two modes: 'Contrato por defecto' (fill contractor/client params form with auto-populated company settings) or 'Contrato personalizado' (paste/upload custom Markdown). Submit calls save-and-negotiate API. Visible only when proposal status is negotiating/accepted/rejected.

admin-proposal-contract-edit.name: Admin Proposal Contract Edit
admin-proposal-contract-edit.description: Admin edits an existing contract's parameters via 'Editar parámetros' button in the Documents tab. Modal opens pre-filled with saved params. Submit calls contract update API.

admin-proposal-contract-download.name: Admin Proposal Contract Download
admin-proposal-contract-download.description: Admin downloads contract PDF (final version) or draft PDF from the Documents tab. Download links visible only when contract has been generated.

admin-proposal-documents-manage.name: Admin Proposal Documents Manage
admin-proposal-documents-manage.description: Admin uploads additional documents (otrosí, legal annex, client document, other with custom label) to a proposal via the Documents tab. Lists existing documents with type badges. Delete non-generated documents.

admin-proposal-document-preview.name: Admin Proposal Document Preview
admin-proposal-document-preview.description: From the Documents tab of the proposal edit page, admin clicks the eye icon next to a document. A modal opens previewing the file inline — PDF (rendered in iframe) or image (via tag), gated by frontend/utils/filePreview.js (isPdfUrl / isImageUrl / canPreviewFile). Non-previewable files (Word/Excel/etc.) keep only the existing download action. Modal is dismissed via close button or backdrop click.
knownGaps: Eye-icon preview modal added to ProposalDocumentsTab.vue on 2026-04-26 (commits 9877df24, e827bd38). E2E spec pending — should mock a /uploads/<file>.pdf URL and assert the modal opens.

admin-proposal-documents-send.name: Admin Proposal Documents Send (SUPERSEDED)
admin-proposal-documents-send.description: SUPERSEDED Apr 22 2026: The 'Enviar al cliente' section was removed from the Documents tab. Documents are now attached from the Correos tab via 'Adjuntar desde Documentos' (see admin-proposal-attach-from-documents). The spec admin-proposal-documents-send.spec.js was deleted. This flow entry is kept for historical traceability only.
knownGaps: Flow superseded — 'Enviar al cliente' section removed from the Documents tab on 2026-04-22; replaced by admin-proposal-attach-from-documents via the Correos tab. Entry retained for historical traceability.

admin-send-branded-email.name: Send Branded Email
admin-send-branded-email.description: Admin sends a branded email from proposal edit page Correos tab. Composer with draggable sections, file attachments, branded preview, and paginated email history.

admin-send-proposal-email.name: Send Proposal Email
admin-send-proposal-email.description: Admin sends a proposal email logged as activity from proposal edit page Enviar correo tab. Same composer UI, each send creates ProposalChangeLog entry.

admin-proposal-attach-from-documents.name: Admin Proposal — Adjuntar desde Documentos
admin-proposal-attach-from-documents.description: From the Correos tab of the proposal edit page, admin clicks 'Adjuntar desde Documentos'. A modal opens listing all available documents: contract PDF + draft (if contract exists), commercial PDF, technical PDF, and any uploaded proposal_documents. Admin selects one or more items and clicks 'Adjuntar (N)'. Selected refs appear as emerald badges below the attachments block. On send, the POST body includes a doc_refs JSON field with the resolved refs. Sending is handled by admin-send-branded-email / admin-send-proposal-email; this flow covers only the selection UX.

admin-diagnostic-attach-from-documents.name: Admin Diagnostic — Adjuntar desde Documentos
admin-diagnostic-attach-from-documents.description: From the Correos tab of the diagnostic edit page, admin clicks 'Adjuntar desde Documentos'. A modal opens listing: NDA final + draft (if NDA generated), the 3 static MD templates fetched from GET /api/diagnostic-templates/, and any uploaded diagnostic attachments. Admin selects and confirms. Selected refs appear as emerald badges in the composer. On send, POST body includes doc_refs. This flow covers only the selection UX.

platform-project-data-model.name: Platform Project Data Model
platform-project-data-model.description: Admin uploads a JSON data model for a project (copy/download template, file upload or paste, validate, submit). Both roles see the entity table (name, description, keyFields, relationship). Empty state and error/retry state.

public-privacy-policy.name: Privacy Policy Page
public-privacy-policy.description: View the public privacy policy page with localized content (ES/EN).

public-terms-conditions.name: Terms and Conditions Page
public-terms-conditions.description: View the public terms and conditions page with localized content (ES/EN).

admin-blog-linkedin-connect.name: Admin Blog LinkedIn Connect
admin-blog-linkedin-connect.description: Admin connects LinkedIn account from blog post edit page via OAuth 2.0 popup flow. Popup opens at authorization URL, user authenticates, /auth/linkedin/callback exchanges code via POST /api/linkedin/callback/, popup notifies opener via postMessage, edit page updates to show connected profile.
knownGaps: OAuth popup requires real LinkedIn credentials — E2E should mock the callback URL and API endpoints

admin-blog-linkedin-publish.name: Admin Blog LinkedIn Publish
admin-blog-linkedin-publish.description: Admin fills LinkedIn summary (ES or EN, ≤1300 chars), selects language, clicks 'Publicar en LinkedIn' → POST /api/blog/admin/:id/publish-linkedin/. Success message renders. Publish button disabled when summary is empty. Last publish timestamp shown after success.

admin-blog-publish-mode.name: Admin Blog Publish Mode
admin-blog-publish-mode.description: From the blog edit page, admin selects how the post should be published via three radio options: 'Borrador' (draft), 'Publicar ahora' (immediate), or 'Programar' (scheduled). Selecting 'Programar' reveals a datetime input for publish_scheduled_for. If the chosen datetime is in the past, an amber overdue banner ([data-test='scheduled-overdue-banner']) warns that the safety-net Huey task will publish on the next run. The mode is computed by frontend/utils/blogPublishMode.js (resolveBlogPublishMode → { mode, scheduledIso, overdue }) and submitted to the blog update endpoint.
knownGaps: Publish-mode radio + scheduled-overdue-banner shipped 2026-04-25 (commit 4862b149). Unit-tested via frontend/test/utils/blogPublishMode.test.js, but no E2E spec covers the admin UI yet.

admin-blog-overdue-detection.name: Admin Blog Overdue Schedule Safety-Net
admin-blog-overdue-detection.description: Backend Huey periodic task scans BlogPost rows where publish_scheduled_for is in the past but the post is still unpublished, then publishes them automatically (and triggers the LinkedIn auto-publish if connected). The management command publish_blog_post.py is a manual escape hatch for the same logic. No browser interaction.
knownGaps: Backend-only safety-net for missed schedules. Covered by backend/content/tests/tasks/test_blog_publish_guards.py; no E2E spec applies.

admin-standalone-email-composer.name: Admin Standalone Email Composer
admin-standalone-email-composer.description: Admin composes and sends branded emails from /panel/emails (not tied to a proposal). Draggable sections, file attachments, branded preview, paginated email history. Uses standalone endpoints: emails/send/, emails/defaults/, emails/history/.

admin-proposal-advanced-filters.name: Admin Proposal Advanced Filters
admin-proposal-advanced-filters.description: Filter proposals using custom saved tabs, status/type/market dropdowns, date range, and text search. Tab bar with add/rename/delete, URL deep-linking via ?tab=<tabId>.

admin-proposal-project-schedule.name: Admin Proposal Project Schedule (Cronograma)
admin-proposal-project-schedule.description: Admin sets per-stage start/end dates (design, development) for an accepted proposal in the Cronograma tab, sees proportional status badges, and marks stages as completed to silence deadline alerts.

admin-client-create-standalone.name: Admin Client Create Standalone
admin-client-create-standalone.description: Create a new client profile from /panel/clients via the modal form, with and without email.

admin-client-delete-orphan.name: Admin Client Delete Orphan
admin-client-delete-orphan.description: Delete an orphan client (zero proposals + zero projects) via the trash icon and confirm modal.

admin-client-delete-protected.name: Admin Client Delete Protected
admin-client-delete-protected.description: Verify that active clients (with proposals or projects) do not expose the delete trash icon.

admin-proposal-client-autocomplete.name: Admin Proposal Client Autocomplete
admin-proposal-client-autocomplete.description: Client picker autocomplete in proposal create/edit: type to search, select a client to auto-fill snapshot fields, fallback "Crear nuevo" when no match.

admin-proposal-client-no-email.name: Admin Proposal Client No Email
admin-proposal-client-no-email.description: Create a proposal without a client email — backend generates a placeholder email and all automations are paused for that client.

admin-proposal-update-client.name: Admin Proposal Update Client
admin-proposal-update-client.description: Change the linked client on an existing proposal from the proposal edit page (/panel/proposals/:id/edit). Admin selects a different client via the autocomplete and saves; snapshot fields update to reflect the new client.

admin-kanban-tasks.name: Admin Kanban Tasks
admin-kanban-tasks.description: Internal Kanban task board at /panel/tasks (alias /panel/tareas redirects here). Admin can create, edit, move across TO DO/In Progress/Blocked/Done columns, and delete tasks.

admin-task-deadline-notification.name: Admin Task Deadline Notification
admin-task-deadline-notification.description: Huey periodic task sends email notifications to task assignees at 40%, 70%, 100% of deadline and for overdue tasks. Backend-only — no browser interaction.
knownGaps: Backend-only Huey periodic task. Covered by backend unit tests; no E2E spec applies.

admin-document-move-folder.name: Admin Document Move Folder
admin-document-move-folder.description: Admin moves a document to a different folder (or removes it from any folder) via MoveFolderModal from the documents page. PATCHes documents/{id}/update/ with folder_id.

admin-document-pdf-download.name: Admin Document PDF Download
admin-document-pdf-download.description: Admin downloads a Document entity as a branded PDF from the document edit page via the 'Descargar PDF' button.
knownGaps: Document PDF generation feature is in progress — endpoint exists (documents/<id>/pdf/) and UI button is present, but E2E spec not yet written.

admin-diagnostic-create.name: Admin Diagnostic Create
admin-diagnostic-create.description: Admin creates a new WebAppDiagnostic from /panel/diagnostics/create: searches for a client via autocomplete, selects language, submits → redirected to edit page with 8 JSON sections seeded from the default template.

admin-diagnostic-send-initial.name: Admin Diagnostic Send Initial
admin-diagnostic-send-initial.description: Admin sends the initial-phase diagnostic from the edit page via 'Enviar envío inicial' — POST /api/diagnostics/:id/send-initial/, stamps `initial_sent_at`, status moves DRAFT → SENT. Public view then exposes only sections with visibility ∈ {initial, both}. The follow-up SENT → NEGOTIATING transition is its own flow (`admin-diagnostic-mark-in-analysis`).

admin-diagnostic-mark-in-analysis.name: Admin Diagnostic Mark In Analysis
admin-diagnostic-mark-in-analysis.description: Admin clicks 'Marcar en análisis' on a SENT diagnostic to acknowledge that the client authorized continuing — opens a ConfirmModal and POSTs /api/diagnostics/:id/mark-in-analysis/, transitioning SENT → NEGOTIATING. The button is only available after `initial_sent_at` is set; afterwards the 'Enviar diagnóstico final' action becomes the next user step.

admin-diagnostic-send-final.name: Admin Diagnostic Send Final
admin-diagnostic-send-final.description: Admin sends the final-phase diagnostic from NEGOTIATING via 'Enviar diagnóstico final' (SENT again, final_sent_at stamped). Public view now also exposes sections with visibility ∈ {final}.

diagnostic-public-view.name: Diagnostic Public View
diagnostic-public-view.description: Client accesses the public diagnostic page via UUID link and navigates the JSON-driven section components (Purpose/Radiography/Categories/DeliveryStructure/ExecutiveSummary/Cost/Timeline/Scope). Initial-phase view hides `final`-only sections. Per-section dwell time is tracked via /api/diagnostics/public/<uuid>/track-section/. Accept/Reject is a separate flow (`diagnostic-public-respond`).

diagnostic-public-respond.name: Diagnostic Public Respond
diagnostic-public-respond.description: On a final-phase SENT public diagnostic, the client clicks 'Aceptar propuesta' or 'Rechazar' in the footer — POST /api/diagnostics/public/<uuid>/respond/ with `decision` ('accept'|'reject'), the page swaps to the acceptance/rejection confirmation footer, and the backend transitions the diagnostic to ACCEPTED or REJECTED.

diagnostic-public-pdf-download.name: Diagnostic Public PDF Download
diagnostic-public-pdf-download.description: Client uses the floating PDF button on the public diagnostic page; browser fetches GET /api/diagnostics/public/:uuid/pdf/. The button shows a spinner while generating and re-enables after the download completes.
knownGaps: Production PDF is generated by ReportLab on the fly; E2E mocks a 200 PDF response and validates the UI path.

diagnostic-public-share.name: Diagnostic Public Share
diagnostic-public-share.description: Client clicks the floating share button on the public diagnostic page; a modal opens with the current URL and a 'Copiar enlace' action. Optionally uses Web Share API if available.

diagnostic-public-dark-mode.name: Diagnostic Public Dark Mode Toggle
diagnostic-public-dark-mode.description: Client toggles dark/light mode via the fixed bottom-left button; the [data-diagnostic-wrapper] element receives data-theme='dark'. Preference persists to localStorage['diagnostic-dark-mode'] and is restored on next page load.

diagnostic-public-onboarding.name: Diagnostic Public Onboarding
diagnostic-public-onboarding.description: First-visit tutorial overlay on the public diagnostic page (DiagnosticOnboarding.vue) that walks the client through the report's structure with step-by-step tooltips, scroll-to-section behavior, and a 'No volver a mostrar' option persisted to localStorage. Mirrors proposal-view-onboarding for the diagnostic module.
knownGaps: DiagnosticOnboarding component (376 lines) shipped 2026-04-26 (commits 9877df24, e827bd38). Component-level unit tests exist (DiagnosticOnboarding.test.js); E2E spec pending.

admin-diagnostic-sections.name: Admin Diagnostic Sections Editor
admin-diagnostic-sections.description: Admin edits the 8 JSON sections from the Secciones tab of the diagnostic edit page. Each section type has a typed form (paragraphs, severity levels, 14-category findings, radiography table, timeline rows, etc.). Changes are debounced and PATCHed to /sections/<id>/update/. The tab also exposes a completeness indicator (% + colored progress bar counting enabled sections with non-empty content_json) and a per-section 'Restaurar contenido por defecto' action (POST /sections/<id>/reset/). Raw-JSON read + bulk apply moved to the JSON tab — see admin-diagnostic-json-export / admin-diagnostic-json-import.

admin-diagnostic-activity.name: Admin Diagnostic Activity Timeline
admin-diagnostic-activity.description: Admin records notes / call / meeting / followup events from the Actividad tab (POST /activity/create/). Timeline shows auto-logged events (created, status change, section updated, email sent, accepted, rejected) alongside manual notes.

admin-diagnostic-analytics.name: Admin Diagnostic Analytics Dashboard
admin-diagnostic-analytics.description: Admin reviews full analytics parity with proposal analytics tab: engagement score (0–100 color-coded), summary KPIs (total views, unique sessions, first view, reading time, coverage, last visit), comparison with global averages, funnel with drop-off %, device breakdown (desktop/mobile/tablet), suggested actions, skipped sections, section heatmap, engagement table, activity timeline, sessions history, and CSV export button. Data sourced from DiagnosticViewEvent + DiagnosticSectionView + DiagnosticChangeLog.

admin-diagnostic-engagement-score.name: Admin Diagnostic Engagement Score
admin-diagnostic-engagement-score.description: Engagement score card renders with correct color-coded level label: Alto engagement (≥70), Engagement moderado (40–69), Bajo engagement (<40). Card hidden when engagement_score is null.

admin-diagnostic-prompt.name: Admin Diagnostic Prompt Editor
admin-diagnostic-prompt.description: Admin copies / edits / downloads the two diagnostic prompts (commercial and technical) from the Prompt tab. State is persisted in localStorage per browser via usePromptState({storageKey, defaultPrompt}).

admin-diagnostic-email.name: Admin Diagnostic Email Composer
admin-diagnostic-email.description: Admin sends a follow-up branded email from the Correos tab of the diagnostic edit page. Composer includes recipient, subject, draggable body sections, footer, and optional attachments. NDA branch: checking 'Adjuntar acuerdo de confidencialidad' appends attach_confidentiality:1 to the FormData and the backend generates and attaches the confidentiality PDF. History lists previous sends.

admin-diagnostic-documents.name: Admin Diagnostic Attachment Management
admin-diagnostic-documents.description: Admin uploads, manages, and sends file attachments (PDF, Word, Excel, images) from the Documentos tab of the diagnostic edit page. Checkbox selection enables the send-to-client button. The send section also exposes a checkbox for the system-generated Acuerdo de Confidencialidad (when present) which is appended to the email as a watermarked draft. System-generated attachments (is_generated=true) cannot be deleted — DELETE returns HTTP 400; this backend protection is defensive only since the UI filters generated NDAs out of the deletable list.
knownGaps: is_generated delete-blocked branch is backend-only (UI offers no delete button for generated NDAs); covered by backend tests, not E2E.

admin-diagnostic-document-preview.name: Admin Diagnostic Document Preview
admin-diagnostic-document-preview.description: From the Documentos tab of the diagnostic edit page, admin clicks the eye icon next to an attachment. A modal opens previewing the file inline — PDF (rendered in iframe) or image (via tag), gated by frontend/utils/filePreview.js (canPreviewFile). Non-previewable files keep only the existing download action. Replaces the previous inline template-expand behavior on DiagnosticDocumentsTab.
knownGaps: Eye-icon preview modal replaced inline template-expand in DiagnosticDocumentsTab.vue on 2026-04-26 (commit 9877df24). Component-level unit test exists (DiagnosticDocumentsTab.spec.js); E2E spec pending.

admin-task-alert-management.name: Admin Task Alert Management
admin-task-alert-management.description: Admin defines one or more manual date-based email alerts per task from the TaskFormModal Alertas section. Supports add (date + optional note), list with sent/pending badge, and delete. Alerts fire via Huey daily at 08:10.

admin-diagnostic-edit.name: Admin Diagnostic Edit
admin-diagnostic-edit.description: Admin edits top-level metadata of an existing WebAppDiagnostic from the General tab: title, client (via ClientAutocomplete) + client-snapshot fields (name/email/phone/company) + propagate-to-profile checkbox, language, investment amount + currency, payment terms (initial/final pct), duration label, and size category. Changes are saved via PATCH /api/diagnostics/:id/update/. Radiografía data is edited as a regular section from the Secciones tab. Section content is edited separately under admin-diagnostic-sections; full-JSON round-trip lives under admin-diagnostic-json-export / admin-diagnostic-json-import.

admin-diagnostic-delete.name: Admin Diagnostic Delete
admin-diagnostic-delete.description: Admin deletes an existing WebAppDiagnostic from the diagnostics list or edit page via confirm modal. DELETE /api/diagnostics/:id/delete/.

admin-diagnostic-confidentiality-generat.name: Admin Diagnostic NDA Generate
admin-diagnostic-confidentiality-generat.description: Admin generates the Acuerdo de Confidencialidad (NDA) PDF from the Documentos tab of the diagnostic edit page. Section displays 'No generado' with a 'Generar acuerdo' CTA when no NDA exists. CTA opens ConfidentialityParamsModal with 12 fields (cliente: nombre/NIT/representante/email; consultor: nombre/NIT/email — defaults to Project App SAS / team@projectapp.co; acuerdo: ciudad — default Medellín, día/mes/año, cláusula penal — default 50 SMMLV). Submit posts to POST /api/diagnostics/:id/confidentiality/params/, which validates via ConfidentialityParamsSerializer, persists to diagnostic.confidentiality_params, and creates a DiagnosticAttachment with document_type='confidentiality_agreement' and is_generated=true. Section then shows 'Generado el {fecha}' with Descargar / Borrador / Editar parámetros buttons.

admin-diagnostic-confidentiality-edit.name: Admin Diagnostic NDA Edit Params
admin-diagnostic-confidentiality-edit.description: Admin re-opens the ConfidentialityParamsModal via 'Editar parámetros' on a diagnostic that already has a generated NDA. Form pre-fills from diagnostic.confidentiality_params. Admin modifies one or more fields and submits — the existing DiagnosticAttachment file is replaced in place (same row id, file.delete + file.save, single .save() call). Section header still shows 'Generado el {fecha}' with the updated timestamp.

admin-diagnostic-confidentiality-downloa.name: Admin Diagnostic NDA Download
admin-diagnostic-confidentiality-downloa.description: Admin downloads the generated Acuerdo de Confidencialidad from the Documentos tab. 'Descargar' link → GET /api/diagnostics/:id/confidentiality/pdf/ (FileResponse, streams the saved PDF with placeholders filled from confidentiality_params). 'Borrador' link → GET /api/diagnostics/:id/confidentiality/draft-pdf/ (renders fresh with all placeholders forced to XXX-XXX-XXX and applies BORRADOR watermark). When no NDA exists, neither link is present and the section shows 'No generado' with 'Generar acuerdo' CTA.

admin-diagnostic-json-export.name: Admin Diagnostic JSON Export
admin-diagnostic-json-export.description: Admin opens the JSON tab of /panel/diagnostics/:id/edit. A read-only textarea renders the full diagnostic serialized as JSON (metadata + sections). Actualizar refetches /detail/ from the server; Copiar writes the current text to the clipboard; Descargar streams a {slug}.json Blob download. The string is lazy-computed from store.current so it rebuilds only when the tab is rendered.

admin-diagnostic-json-import.name: Admin Diagnostic JSON Import
admin-diagnostic-json-import.description: Admin imports a JSON blob from the JSON tab of /panel/diagnostics/:id/edit, either by pasting into the textarea or uploading a .json file (FileReader → textarea). Parse runs on every input; validation requires a root object with an array `sections`. A preview strip shows client name, section count, and formatted investment. Aplicar JSON runs PATCH /update/ for metadata first, then POST /sections/bulk-update/; success emits an inline toast and resyncs the pricing/radiography forms. Errors surface inline and abort the apply.
knownGaps: Legacy deep-links ?tab=plantillas|pricing|radiography redirect to the new tab ids — not yet asserted.

admin-diagnostic-defaults-config.name: Admin Diagnostic Defaults Config
admin-diagnostic-defaults-config.description: Admin manages the per-language default config applied to new WebAppDiagnostic rows from /panel/diagnostics/defaults/. The General tab edits language, currency, default investment amount, default duration label, payment percentages (auto-synced to sum 100, default 60/40), and reminder/urgency/expiration days. Save PUTs /api/diagnostics/defaults/?lang= and the response is applied directly (no refetch). Reset opens a ConfirmModal and POSTs /defaults/reset/ to delete the row, falling back to the hardcoded seed. Sections, Plantillas de Email (link), Prompt (placeholder) and JSON tabs render from the same config payload.

admin-proposal-diagnostic-templates.name: Proposal — Documentos Tab
admin-proposal-diagnostic-templates.description: Admin views the 'Documentos' tab on the proposal edit page. Tab is visible for proposals in sent|viewed|negotiating|accepted|rejected status. Shows a unified document list (Contrato de desarrollo, Propuesta comercial PDF, Detalle técnico PDF) plus a 'Documentos adjuntos' section with upload form. Does NOT show 'Enviar documentos al cliente' (that section was removed Apr 22 2026 — sending is done from the Correos tab).

admin-diagnostic-markdown-attachment.name: Diagnostic Email — Markdown to PDF Attachment
admin-diagnostic-markdown-attachment.description: When a diagnostic is in 'negotiating' status, admin sees a 'Crear documento desde markdown' button in the Correos tab. Clicking it opens MarkdownAttachmentModal, which takes a title, a markdown textarea, and three cover-toggle checkboxes. A 'Plantillas base' row provides three copy-to-clipboard buttons (Diagnóstico de Aplicación / Diagnóstico Técnico / Anexo) that fetch GET /api/diagnostic-templates/:slug/ on first click and write the markdown to the clipboard; subsequent clicks use an in-memory cache. The Vista previa button is disabled until both title and markdown are filled; clicking it POSTs to POST /api/diagnostics/:id/email/markdown-attachment/ (returns an inline PDF). The PDF is rendered in an iframe for review. Clicking Adjuntar converts the blob to a File and emits @attach — appending it to the email attachments list with a success toast.

proposal-value-added-modules.name: Proposal Value Added Modules
proposal-value-added-modules.description: Public proposal section (section_type value_added_modules) renders a card grid of included-free modules resolved from the proposal's functional_requirements groups. Each card shows title, icon, justification text, and a 'Gratis' badge. An optional footer_note is displayed below the grid. Falls back to 'Incluido sin costo adicional' when no title is provided in content_json.

admin-diagnostic-list.name: Admin Diagnostic List
admin-diagnostic-list.description: Admin views the list of all WebAppDiagnostics, searches by client name or title, and navigates to create or edit flows.

admin-diagnostic-filters.name: Admin Diagnostic Filters
admin-diagnostic-filters.description: Filter diagnostics using saved tabs with localStorage persistence and URL sync (?tab=<tabId>). Filter dimensions: statuses (multi-select), investmentMin/Max, createdAfter/Before. Tab bar supports add/rename/delete (max 12 tabs).
knownGaps: Covered by admin-diagnostic-advanced-filters.spec.js (4 tests: default view, filter toggle, tab creation, search).

admin-diagnostic-advanced-filters.name: Admin Diagnostic Advanced Filters
admin-diagnostic-advanced-filters.description: Admin filters diagnostics from /panel/diagnostics via DiagnosticFilterPanel + ProposalFilterTabs. Default view shows all diagnostics. 'Filtros' toggle opens/closes the filter panel (Estados dimension visible). '+' button creates a named saved-filter tab (persisted to localStorage). Search input filters the card list by title client-side.

admin-client-edit.name: Admin Client Edit
admin-client-edit.description: Admin edits an existing client profile from /panel/clients by clicking the edit (pencil) icon on a client row. The edit modal opens pre-filled with the client's name, email, phone, and company. Admin modifies fields and submits — PUT /api/proposals/client-profiles/:id/update/ — modal closes on success. A 400 response surfaces validation errors and keeps the modal open.

admin-defaults-unified.name: Admin Unified Defaults Shell
admin-defaults-unified.description: Admin navigates to /panel/defaults — a unified shell page with a Propuesta/Diagnóstico mode switch. Default mode is proposal. Clicking Diagnóstico updates the URL to ?mode=diagnostic and renders DiagnosticDefaultsPanel. Direct navigation to ?mode=diagnostic lands in diagnostic mode. The back link label changes by mode (Volver a Propuestas / Volver a Diagnósticos). Old routes /panel/proposals/defaults and /panel/diagnostics/defaults redirect here preserving the ?tab= param.

admin-layout-title-mapping.name: Admin Layout Browser Tab Title
admin-layout-title-mapping.description: Browser tab title in admin.vue updates reactively to show 'Project App (ViewName)' based on the current route. Covers: exact match (dashboard), static prefix match, more-specific route priority, and dynamic regex routes (/panel/proposals/:id/edit → 'Edit. propuesta').

platform-layout-title-mapping.name: Platform Layout Browser Tab Title
platform-layout-title-mapping.description: Browser tab title in platform.vue updates reactively to show 'Project App (ViewName)'. Covers: static route (dashboard, projects), dynamic project base route (/platform/projects/:id → 'Proyecto'), and nested dynamic route ordering (/platform/projects/:id/board → 'Tablero' beats project base regex).

admin-proposal-platform-handoff.name: Admin Proposal → Platform Handoff
admin-proposal-platform-handoff.description: After a proposal is accepted, admin clicks 'Lanzar a plataforma' — POST /api/proposals/:id/launch-to-platform/ — which creates a PlatformProject linked to the proposal and sends the client a platform invitation email with an OTP. Admin sees a 'Ver en plataforma' action in the proposal actions panel. Client then starts the platform onboarding flow (platform-login → platform-verify-onboarding → platform-complete-profile).
knownGaps: No E2E spec covers the full proposal-accepted → launch-to-platform → platform-project-created handoff. Covers a critical cross-module transition between the proposal and platform modules.

diagnostic-public-phase-visibility.name: Diagnostic Public Phase Visibility
diagnostic-public-phase-visibility.description: The public diagnostic page renders different sections depending on the diagnostic phase. After admin sends initial phase (initial_sent_at set, status=SENT), only sections with visibility ∈ {initial, both} appear. After admin sends final phase (final_sent_at set), sections with visibility='final' (e.g. executive_summary, cost, timeline) are also returned by the API and appear in the sidebar. E2E should mock two API responses (initial-phase vs final-phase) and assert which section types render in each state.
knownGaps: diagnostic-public-view E2E covers general section rendering and accept/reject, but does not explicitly assert that final-only sections are absent in initial-phase and present in final-phase.

admin-proposal-section-disable.name: Admin Proposal Section Disable/Enable Toggle
admin-proposal-section-disable.description: Admin toggles section visibility (is_enabled) from the Secciones tab of the proposal edit page. Each section row has an enable/disable toggle; disabled sections are greyed out in the admin list and excluded from the public proposal view. PATCH /api/proposals/sections/:id/update/ with { is_enabled: false }. Complements admin-proposal-section-reorder — both operations can be combined in sequence.
knownGaps: admin-proposal-section-reorder covers drag reorder only. No E2E explicitly asserts that toggling is_enabled on a section removes it from the public proposal view.

proposal-slug-access.name: Proposal Slug Access
proposal-slug-access.description: Client accesses a proposal via its human-friendly slug URL (/proposal/<slug>/). The store detects non-UUID identifiers and routes the request to the by-slug API endpoint. UUID-based access must still work for backward compatibility. Unknown slugs must render the 404/not-found state.

admin-proposal-slug-edit.name: Admin Proposal Slug Edit
admin-proposal-slug-edit.description: Admin sets or regenerates the human-friendly slug (URL personalizada) for a proposal from the General tab. Includes format validation (lowercase/numbers/hyphens), uniqueness error on 400, and one-click regeneration from client name. PATCH /api/proposals/:id/update/ with { slug }.
knownGaps: Slug input, save, and regenerate actions on the proposal edit General tab have no E2E coverage.

admin-proposal-defaults-slug-pattern.name: Admin Proposal Defaults — Slug Pattern
admin-proposal-defaults-slug-pattern.description: Admin configures the default slug pattern used when new proposals are created (e.g. {client_name}, {client_name}-{year}). Live preview shows the slugified result. Saved to ProposalDefaultConfig.default_slug_pattern via PUT /api/proposals/defaults/.
knownGaps: Slug pattern input and preview in ProposalDefaultsPanel General tab have no E2E coverage.

platform-access-view.name: Platform Access View
platform-access-view.description: Admin-only quick-access hub at /platform/access: grid of project cards with clickable URLs (production, staging, Django admin, repository) and copy/reveal credential controls.
